summary: Frontend testing completed for clickable benefit/use case cards, feature detail pages, and mobile responsiveness. All 10 feature/use-case detail pages load correctly with header (logo + navigation), footer, and 7-language translation support. Mobile responsiveness verified on 375x812 viewport.
critical_code_review_comments: BenefitGrid.jsx correctly uses Link component with data-testid attributes for all 6 benefit cards
UseCasesSection.jsx correctly uses Link component with data-testid attributes for all 4 use case cards
MarketingLayout.jsx provides consistent header with logo, navigation, language selector, and footer across all feature/use-case pages
FeatureDetailPage.jsx is a reusable component that properly translates content using featureKey pattern
All 10 feature/use-case pages are properly routed in App.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All clickable card navigation and feature detail pages verified working. Mobile responsiveness tested on 375x812 viewport.

tests.feature_detail_page: ✓ Header, content, benefits, footer all display correctly
